markets.question: Will the price of XRP be between $1.70 and $1.80 on May 5?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the final "Close" price of the Binance 1 minute candle for XRP/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

markets.question: Will "Bully - Ye" be the Billboard 200 #1 album for the week of May 9?
markets.description:
Billboard updates the Billboard 200 albums chart each Tuesday (with adjusted release schedules on some holiday weeks), reflecting data from the previous week (Friday-Thursday). Each Billboard chart is then dated “Week of (date of the upcoming Saturday)”.

This market will resolve according to the number 1 album on the Billboard 200 chart dated “Week of May 9, 2026”.

This market will resolve as soon as the relevant chart is published. If the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week is not published within 14 calendar days of the expected release date, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week, published on the Billboard website (https://www.billboard.com/charts/billboard-200/) or through other official Billboard channels.

markets.question: Will the lowest temperature in Miami be between 82-83°F on May 4?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the lowest temperature recorded at the Miami Intl Airport Station in degrees Fahrenheit on 4 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the lowest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Miami Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/fl/miami/KMIA.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: National Weather Service guidance and ensemble forecast models like GFS and ECMWF project Miami International Airport's lowest temperature on May 4 around 73-76°F, fueling the tight trader consensus with 72-73°F, 74-75°F, and 76-77°F bins each at 50.5% implied probability amid minor 2-3°F spreads. Southerly winds around 5-10 mph and partly cloudy skies limit radiative cooling, holding lows above climatological early-May norms of 72°F while urban heat island effects at the airport add warmth. Recent 24-hour updates show stable high pressure dominating, with no major disruptions like fronts or heavy rain. Key differentiators include potential overnight cloud variability trapping heat versus clearer skies allowing dips to 72°F; watch afternoon NWS revisions and 12z model runs for shifts before resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects tight uncertainty in Central Weather Administration (CWA) forecasts for Taipei's highest temperature on May 4, with official models projecting a 23–30°C range amid a transitioning weather pattern from recent cloudy, milder conditions (around 25°C highs earlier this week) toward clearer skies under a high-pressure ridge. The even split across 21–25°C outcomes stems from divergent ensemble model runs: persistent low-level clouds or sea breezes could cap peaks at the lower end near 21–23°C, while stronger solar heating and lighter winds favor 24–25°C; historical early-May averages hover near 28°C, but current cool air advection introduces downside risk. Watch CWA's daily updates tomorrow for refined guidance on cloud cover and afternoon showers.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects high uncertainty in Jeddah's highest temperature on May 4, with model ensembles from ECMWF and GFS projecting daytime highs of 36–38°C amid a slight warm-up from late-April's hazy 33°C observations. Coastal moderation by the Red Sea—via sea breezes limiting peak heating—clashes with potential subsidence under high-pressure ridges that could push toward 39°C or higher, explaining the 26.5% implied probability for that outcome versus clustered 35–38°C bins around 19–20%. Recent National Center for Meteorology updates note no precipitation risks but lingering dust haze reducing solar insolation, while climatological early-May averages hover near 36°C. Watch NCM's daily bulletins and fresh model runs on May 3 for shifts in sea surface temperature influences and wind patterns.

markets.question: Map 2: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 2, or if Map 2 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Imperial Academy vs Infinite (BO3) - United21 Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Upper bracket quarterfinal 1 match between Imperial Academy and Infinite in the United21 Playoffs, initially scheduled for April 9 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Imperial Academy" if Imperial Academy win the match against Infinite.

This market will resolve to "Infinite" if Infinite win the match against Imperial Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Imperial Academy enters the United21 Season 47 playoffs upper bracket quarterfinal as Group A winners with a perfect 2-0 record and +16 map differential, showcasing strong form on Inferno, Dust II, and Ancient against LPH Gaming and Sangal ALTERS. Infinite advanced from Group D in 2nd place at 2-1 but faced roster instability with multiple stand-ins—including SHiPZ, Blytz, marTineZ, and fnl—potentially disrupting preparation and meta adaptation on maps like Nuke and Overpass. Imperial's rebuilt young lineup (average age 18.9, led by ta9z and Aliot at 1.12 HLTV rating) brings fresh momentum post-March changes, while Infinite's core holds experience; BO3 format favors map pool versatility amid CS2's pistol and AWP-heavy meta.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket overwhelmingly favors a high temperature of 68°F or higher in Houston on May 4 (99.4% implied probability), driven by National Weather Service forecasts and NOAA climatological normals showing early May daily highs averaging 84–86°F at Houston's Intercontinental Airport, with daily highs rarely dipping below 77°F historically. Recent model runs from the past 48 hours indicate clearing conditions post-cold front, with sunny skies and highs rebounding to the low 80s amid high pressure building over Texas, aligning with Old Farmer's Almanac projections of 3°F-above-normal May warmth. Scenarios challenging this include an unforeseen stalled front or persistent Gulf moisture capping temperatures below 70°F, though current ensemble guidance shows minimal risk ahead of daily NWS updates.

This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the William P. Hobby Airport Station in degrees Fahrenheit on 4 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the William P. Hobby Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/tx/houston/KHOU.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket overwhelmingly favors a high temperature of 68°F or higher in Houston on May 4 (99.4% implied probability), driven by National Weather Service forecasts and NOAA climatological normals showing early May daily highs averaging 84–86°F at Houston's Intercontinental Airport, with daily highs rarely dipping below 77°F historically. Recent model runs from the past 48 hours indicate clearing conditions post-cold front, with sunny skies and highs rebounding to the low 80s amid high pressure building over Texas, aligning with Old Farmer's Almanac projections of 3°F-above-normal May warmth. Scenarios challenging this include an unforeseen stalled front or persistent Gulf moisture capping temperatures below 70°F, though current ensemble guidance shows minimal risk ahead of daily NWS updates.

markets.question: Will Baltimore Orioles win the 2026 AL East title?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the team that wins the 2026 MLB American League East division.

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official winner as determined by MLB rules. If multiple winners are announced then this market will resolve to the team whose listed nickname comes first alphabetically.

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed team to be named the 2026 American League East division champion per the rules of the MLB (e.g., they are eliminated in the playoffs), the corresponding market will resolve to “No”.

If the 2026 MLB regular season is cancelled, postponed after October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from Major League Baseball (https://www.mlb.com/); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: The New York Yankees' commanding 20-11 AL East lead and league-best +47 run differential underpin their 68.5% implied probability as division favorites, fueled by Aaron Judge's MLB-leading home runs, a 10-1 stretch in their last 11 games, and four straight series wins as of early May. Tampa Bay Rays trail closely at 18-12, gaining ground with strong pitching and roster ingenuity to claim 8.8%, while Toronto Blue Jays' offseason additions like Kazuma Okamoto position them at 11% despite middling results. Baltimore Orioles languish at 15-16 amid a 10-deep injured list including Dean Kremer, dropping them to 5.5%, and Boston Red Sox's last-place 13-19 mark reflects pitching woes at 4.8%.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket clusters around 28°C (32.5%) as the highest temperature in Guangzhou on May 3, with 27°C (22.5%) and 26°C (20.0%) close behind, capturing the inherent uncertainty in early May forecasts during the subtropical monsoon transition. Latest guidance from China Meteorological Administration analogs and sites like AccuWeather projects daytime highs near 28°C under partly cloudy conditions with light rain showers (forecast probability ~30%), which suppress peaks via increased cloud cover and evaporative cooling. Outcomes like 29°C (19.5%) gain traction if skies clear for stronger solar heating and southerly sea breezes advecting warmth, while 25°C or below hinges on heavier precipitation or northerly winds. Historical early-May highs average 28-29°C; intraday CMA updates will sharpen model consensus as the resolution window approaches.

events.title: 2026 NBA Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NBA Finals.

eventMetadata.context_description: Oklahoma City Thunder's status as defending champions and No. 1 West seed has solidified trader consensus at 55.5% implied probability for the 2026 NBA title, boosted by their dominant 4-0 first-round sweep of the Suns capped April 27 with Shai Gilgeous-Alexander's 42-point outburst showcasing elite offense and depth. San Antonio Spurs hold 20.1% as the top West challenger after advancing past Portland, leveraging Victor Wembanyama's growth and young core momentum amid a nine-game win streak earlier. Boston Celtics' 9.4% trails despite strong East positioning (No. 2 seed), with odds slipping on playoff parity and East contenders like Knicks (5.3%) and Pistons (3.0%) crowding the path via recent series wins. OKC odds climbed 18 points post-playoffs start, reflecting skin-in-the-game wisdom.

markets.question: Will ByteDance have the #2 AI model at the end of June 2026 (Style Control On)?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model that has the second-highest arena rank (Style Control On) based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on June 30, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control on will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies second place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

markets.question: Will "Octane - Don Toliver" be the Billboard 200 #1 album for the week of May 9?
markets.description:
Billboard updates the Billboard 200 albums chart each Tuesday (with adjusted release schedules on some holiday weeks), reflecting data from the previous week (Friday-Thursday). Each Billboard chart is then dated “Week of (date of the upcoming Saturday)”.

This market will resolve according to the number 1 album on the Billboard 200 chart dated “Week of May 9, 2026”.

This market will resolve as soon as the relevant chart is published. If the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week is not published within 14 calendar days of the expected release date, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week, published on the Billboard website (https://www.billboard.com/charts/billboard-200/) or through other official Billboard channels.

events.title: Super Rugby Pacific: Reds vs Chiefs
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Super Rugby Pacific match between Reds and Chiefs, scheduled for May 8 2026.

eventMetadata.context_description: Queensland Reds hold a slim trader consensus edge at home in Suncorp Stadium against table-topping Chiefs, whose recent bye provides rest advantages and full recovery for key All Blacks like Damian McKenzie at fly-half and Wallace Sititi at No.8, fueling their league-leading attack with eight wins from ten starts. Reds counter with momentum from snapping a 15-year Crusaders hoodoo via a 31-26 upset, boasting strong home form amid tight Super Rugby Pacific standings, though playmakers Carter Gordon (knee) and Tom Lynagh remain sidelined, testing depth at ten. Head-to-head history and balanced recent records—Chiefs' 42-14 Waratahs rout offset by Reds' resilience—keep implied probabilities bunched near 47%, underscoring a fiercely contested Round 13 clash with draw viability high.

eventMetadata.context_description: California Governor Gavin Newsom leads trader consensus at 26.5% implied probability for the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination, buoyed by April Echelon Insights polling naming him the most electable contender among Democrats due to his executive experience, national fundraising prowess, and consistent anti-Trump media presence. Former Vice President Kamala Harris follows at 10.6% despite topping April hypotheticals like McLaughlin's (29%) and her April 10 National Action Network signal of interest, as traders weigh her 2024 general election loss as lingering baggage. Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez's 8.5% reflects surging appeal to young voters, while Sen. Jon Ossoff's 6.6% signals moderate Southern potential. In this fragmented field, 2026 midterms, early primary polling trends, and donor consolidation could tip momentum toward governors or battleground senators.

markets.question: Will West Ham be relegated from the English Premier League after the 2025–26 season?
markets.description:
This is a polymarket to predict which clubs are relegated from the English Premier League after the 2025–26 season.

If the listed club is officially relegated by the English Premier League following the 2025–26 season, this market will resolve to "Yes". Otherwise, it will resolve to "No".

If the 2025–26 English Premier League season is canceled or not completed by October 1, 2026, this market will resolve to "No".

The primary resolution source will be official information from the English Premier League. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will Elon Musk post 320-339 tweets from May 5 to May 12, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X from May 5 12:00 PM ET to May 12, 2026 12:00 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1786073478711353576 will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

Community reposts which are not counted by the tracker not count toward the total.

The resolution source for this market is the 'Post Counter' figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

Reality TV personality Spencer Pratt has surged to 22% with viral social media ads targeting politicians' wealth and outsider appeal to conservatives frustrated with city leadership, while Bass trails at 20.5% despite endorsements like the LA Area Chamber of Commerce, hampered by unfavorable voter views in recent UCLA polling revealing 40% undecideds. markets.question: Will Discord’s market cap be $30B or greater at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on Discord's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

If no IPO occurs by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO by June 30, 2026".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency. It is calculated as the number of shares outstanding multiplied by the closing share price on the first trading day.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Resolution will be based on the primary exchange’s official listing page. In the event that the relevant figure is not displayed, another reliable source will be used.

In the event of an interruption in the course of the normal trading session on Discord’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that as the first day of trading for purposes of this market.

Despite initial buzz around a potential Q1 debut targeting $15-25 billion valuation—anchored to its 2021 $15 billion private round—absence of a public S-1 prospectus, roadshow, or pricing signals amid tepid secondary market trading at $7-10 billion has eroded sentiment. Recent delays in age verification rollout to late 2026 underscore operational priorities over rushed listing, while the <15 billion market cap outcome at 16.8% captures downside valuation risks if pursued. Key catalysts include any S-1 disclosure or market window alignment before quarter-end.

markets.question: Will Liverpool qualify for the League Phase of the 2026-27 UEFA Conference League?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed team clinches a league phase spot in the 2026-27 Conference League per UEFA rules. Otherwise, the associated market will resolve to "No".

If at any point it becomes impossible for the listed team to clinch a league phase spot in the 2026-27 Conference League (e.g. they cannot mathematically achieve a Conference League place, cannot qualify through play in European or cup competitions, etc.), the associated market will resolve to "No". 

If the 2025-26 English Premier League season is cancelled, postponed after August 31, 2026 11:59 PM ET, or the teams that qualified for the 2026-27 Conference League have not been officially confirmed by UEFA within that timeframe, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market will be official information from UEFA and/or the EPL; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will gemini-3-pro have the best AI model on May 8, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the model that has the highest arena rank based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on the specified date, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control off will be used to resolve this market.

No new model will be added to this market after market creation. Any model not explicitly listed in this market will be encompassed under the "Other" option.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie still remains, alphabetical order of model names as listed in this market group (full string, including suffixes such as “-thinking”) will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if two models remain tied, “claude-opus-4-6” would be ranked ahead of “claude-opus-4-6-thinking”). This market will resolve to the model that comes first according to this order.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

markets.question: Spread: FC Barcelona (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming UEFA Women's Champions League game, scheduled for May 3 at 10:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "FC Barcelona" if FC Barcelona win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "FC Bayern München".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on uefa.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: FC Barcelona vs. FC Bayern München - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the UEFA Women's Champions League game, scheduled for May 3 at 10:30 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Barcelona Femení hold a commanding position in Liga F with a near-perfect 24-0-1 record, propelled by recent thumpings of Real Madrid including a 3-0 quarter-final win on March 29 to secure their UEFA Women's Champions League semi-final spot against Bayern Frauen. Bayern, unbeaten domestically this season atop the Frauen-Bundesliga save for a 7-1 group-stage drubbing by Barcelona in October 2025, advanced via a gritty 5-3 aggregate over Manchester City with late strikes from Viggósdóttir and Dallmann. First leg on April 25 in Munich favors Bayern's home crowd and revenge motive, but Barcelona's depth shines despite Aitana Bonmatí's ongoing fibula absence until early May; Bayern miss winger Klara Bühl (muscle injury). Head-to-head favors Barça (4-1-0), underscoring trader focus on aggregate dynamics, clean sheets, and Salma Paralluelo's form.

markets.question: Will Giannis Antetokounmpo play for the Atlanta Hawks in 2026-27?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the next team Giannis Antetokounmpo officially joins by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

If Giannis Antetokounmpo does not officially join a new team by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Milwaukee Bucks”.

If Giannis Antetokounmpo joins a team that is not listed, this market will resolve to “Other”.

If Giannis Antetokounmpo retires or is not under contract with any professional team by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

An official acquisition announcement prior to the market’s close date will immediately resolve this market to the corresponding option.

The primary resolution sources for this market will be official announcements from the Milwaukee Bucks and/or the acquiring team. A consensus of credible media reporting may also be used to resolve the market.

markets.question: Will the BLAST Rivals Fort Worth 2026 Grand Final be a sweep?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Grand Final of BLAST Rivals Fort Worth 2026, scheduled to take place from April 29 to May 3, 2026 ends with the winning team not losing a single map, regardless of format. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No."

Maps or series decided by forfeit or administrative decision will result in a "No" resolution for this market.

If BLAST Rivals Fort Worth 2026 is canceled, postponed after May 17, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or the official results or statistics from BLAST Rivals Fort Worth 2026 are not published within this timeframe, this market will resolve "No".

The primary resolution source will be the official BLAST.tv match pages and statistics (https://blast.tv/cs/tournaments). However, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Busan be 13°C on May 3?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Gimhae Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 3 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Gimhae Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/kr/busan/RKPK.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Korea Meteorological Administration (KMA) forecasts for Busan on May 3 indicate a high of 16–18°C at Gimhae International Airport and nearby stations, with mostly cloudy skies and continuous rain from early morning through afternoon, capping temperatures via reduced solar insolation and evaporative cooling. This follows warmer conditions earlier in the week, including May 2 highs near 24°C, as a frontal system ushers in southwest winds at 6–12 knots and 60% precipitation probability. Trader consensus reflects tight odds between 17–19°C due to model discrepancies on rain intensity and potential brief cloud breaks allowing slight warming; updated KMA guidance expected overnight could refine the peak, with climatological early-May averages around 19°C providing baseline context amid inherent short-term forecast uncertainty.

markets.question: Will Jonas Wind be the top goal scorer in the 2025–26 Bundesliga season?
markets.description:
This is a polymarket to predict which player will finish as the top goal scorer in the 2025–26 Bundesliga season.

If the listed player finishes as the sole top goal scorer in the 2025–26 Bundesliga season, the market will resolve to "Yes". Otherwise, it will resolve to "No".

Goals scored in Bundesliga matches only will count. Goals in other competitions (e.g., DFB-Pokal, German Super Cup, Champions League, Europa League, international matches) will not count for this market.

If multiple players tie for the top goal scorer, the market will resolve to the player whose last name comes first alphabetically.

If the 2025–26 Bundesliga season is canceled or not completed by August 1, 2026, the market will resolve to "Other".

The primary resolution source will be official statistics from the Bundesliga. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Harry Kane's dominant 33-goal haul for Bayern Munich in the 2025/26 Bundesliga season, a 15-goal cushion over VfB Stuttgart's Deniz Undav on 18, has locked in trader consensus at 99.5% implied probability for the top goalscorer crown ahead of Matchday 32. Kane's relentless form, including recent strikes against Stuttgart and Union Berlin amid Bayern's title-clinching run, has widened the gap despite late surges from Luis Díaz and Serhou Guirassy (both 15 goals) and Michael Olise (13). With only three matchdays remaining until May 16, challengers face impossible math even via hat-tricks every game. A severe Kane injury or unexpected benching could alone challenge this, though Bayern's secured championship minimizes rest risks.

eventMetadata.context_description: Korea Meteorological Administration-linked forecasts project a maximum temperature of 19°C in Seoul on May 4 amid persistent cloudy skies and rain, capping highs after similar cool, wet conditions on May 2 (22°C) and May 3 (16°C). This pattern, featuring morning lows near 10°C and precipitation probabilities of 60%, deviates below the early May climatological average of around 20°C, influenced by seasonal frontal systems and cloud cover suppressing daytime heating. Trader consensus reflects this short-term outlook, though inherent forecast uncertainty persists—new model runs from KMA could adjust for potential clearing. Monitor afternoon updates and resolution via official KMA observations at Seoul stations.

markets.question: Map 1: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 1, or if Map 1 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Spirit Academy vs Wave Esports (BO3) - Exort Series Main Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Round 1 match between Spirit Academy and Wave Esports in the Exort Series Main Stage, initially scheduled for April 16 at 11:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Spirit Academy" if Spirit Academy win the match against Wave Esports.

This market will resolve to "Wave Esports" if Wave Esports win the match against Spirit Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spirit Academy enters as the clear trader favorite in this BO3 matchup from Exort Series #25 Main Stage, buoyed by their academy backing from elite org Team Spirit and dominant 3-0 group stage run, capped by a 2-1 win over Wave Esports on April 16 (Dust II 13-6, Mirage 9-7/6-1, Ancient 13-5). Wave, hampered by stand-ins cMS and pxsl, crashed out 0-3 amid defensive lapses on Nuke and Mirage. Spirit's young roster—VILBy, mazay, Kiryasoo, kidofpain, s1nside—excels in current CS2 meta's aggressive T-sides and map control, contrasting Wave's #149-ranked squad (miksozzz, Belof, Katalic, sheezy) with 37.5% recent win rate. No roster shifts since the April 26 playoffs, where Spirit fell 0-2 in the grand final.

markets.question: Will Sweetgreen (SG) beat quarterly earnings?
markets.description:
As of market creation, Sweetgreen is estimated to release earnings on May 7, 2026. The Street consensus estimate for Sweetgreen's GAAP EPS for the relevant quarter is $-0.23 as of market creation. This market will resolve to "Yes" if Sweetgreen reports GAAP EPS greater than $-0.23 for the relevant quarter in its next quarterly earnings release. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No." The resolution source will be the GAAP EPS listed in the company’s official earnings documents. 

If Sweetgreen releases earnings without GAAP EPS, then the market will resolve according to the GAAP EPS figure reported by SeekingAlpha. If no such figure is published within 96h of market close (4:00:00pm ET) on the day earnings are announced, the market will resolve to “No”.

If the company does not release earnings within 45 calendar days of the estimated earnings date, this market will resolve to “No.” 

Note: Subsequent restatements, corrections, or revisions made to the initially announced GAAP EPS figure will not qualify for resolution, except in the case of obvious and immediate mistakes (e.g., fat finger errors, as with Lyft's (LYFT) earnings release in February 2024).
Note: The strike prices used in these markets are derived from SeekingAlpha estimates, and reflect the consensus of sell-side analyst estimates for GAAP EPS. 
Note: All figures will be rounded to the nearest cent using standard rounding.
Note: For the purposes of this market, IFRS EPS will be treated as GAAP EPS.
Note: For the purposes of this market, GAAP EPS refers to diluted GAAP EPS, unless this is not published, in which case it refers to basic GAAP EPS.
Note: All figures are expressed in USD, unless otherwise indicated.
Note: For primarily internationally listed companies, this market refers specifically to the shares traded in the United States on U.S. stock exchanges such as the NYSE or Nasdaq. In cases where the company trades in the U.S. through an American Depositary Receipt (ADR) or American Depositary Share (ADS), this market will refer to the ADR/ADS.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices an 86.5% implied probability that Sweetgreen (SG) will report Q1 2026 GAAP EPS exceeding the consensus estimate of -$0.23, driven primarily by a positive Zacks Earnings ESP of +6.67%, where the most accurate analyst forecast tops the consensus amid recent 1.54% downward revisions over the past 30 days. This signal, paired with SG's Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), historically delivers an earnings beat nearly 70% of the time. Despite Q4 2025 revenue miss at $155.2 million (-3.5% YoY) and same-store sales plunge of -11.5%, alongside FY2026 guidance for 2-4% SSS declines, the low EPS bar and potential margin improvements fuel optimism. Earnings release looms May 7 after market close.

markets.question: Spread: NEC (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Eredivisie game, scheduled for May 2 at 3:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "NEC" if NEC win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Telstar 1963".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on eredivisie.nl. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: NEC vs. Telstar 1963 - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Eredivisie game, scheduled for May 2 at 3:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: NEC Nijmegen, entrenched in third place in the Eredivisie standings with 53 points from 29 matches, welcomes relegation-threatened SC Telstar (17th, 27 points from 30 games) to Goffertstadion on May 2. NEC's recent 3-2 upset victory over league leaders PSV underscores their strong momentum and top-four push, bolstered by solid home form and a dominant head-to-head record (7 wins to Telstar's 2, including a 2-2 draw earlier this season at Telstar). Telstar, however, languishes on a six-match winless streak, suffering heavy defeats like 0-3 to Heerenveen and 1-4 at Utrecht, exposing defensive frailties away. Injuries sideline NEC's Freek Entius and Telstar's Adil Lechkar, while late-season stakes heighten intensity for both survival and European qualification.

markets.question: Will Jasmine Paolini win the 2026 Women’s French Open?
markets.description:
The 2026 French Open is scheduled for May 18 - June 7, 2026.

This market will resolve to the player that wins the 2026 French Open Women’s Singles Tournament.

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed player to win the 2026 French Open Women’s Singles Tournament per the rules of the tournament, the corresponding market will resolve to “No”.

If the 2026 French Open Women’s Singles Tournament is cancelled, postponed after July 31, 2026, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the French Open (https://www.rolandgarros.com/en-us/); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

Elena Rybakina's 11.5% reflects her No. 2 status and baseline power suited to Roland Garros rallies, while Iga Świątek's drop to 16.5% stems from a rankings slide to No. 4 and inconsistent spring clay results despite her three-time champion history. Coco Gauff at 9.0% benefits from No. 3 seeding and movement advantages, but teen Mirra Andreeva's 8.2% surges on her tour-leading clay win streak, including deep Madrid run, signaling breakout potential in the Grand Slam draw.

eventMetadata.context_description: National Weather Service guidance projects a high near 90°F at Miami International Airport today under mostly sunny skies with south winds of 9-15 mph, driving closely matched trader sentiment for 90-91°F and 92-93°F outcomes amid moderate to major HeatRisk. This clustering reflects uncertainty in sea breeze timing—the diurnal onshore flow from the Atlantic typically moderates coastal highs after midday, but persistent subtropical ridging and warm air advection over the past 48 hours, including yesterday's 87°F peak, could delay it and enable upper-90s potential. Minimal convection risk supports prolonged insolation, though urban heat island effects at KMIA amplify readings above climatological May norms of 85°F. Hourly observations through 3-4 PM EDT will clarify the peak.

markets.question: Will "The Devil Wears Prada 2" Opening Weekend Box Office be less than 70m?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to how much "The Devil Wears Prada 2" Opening Weekend Box Office will gross domestically on its opening weekend. The "Daily Box Office Performance" figures found on the “Box Office” tab on this movie's The Numbers (https://www.the-numbers.com/) page will be used to resolve this market once the values for the 3-day opening weekend (May 1 - May 3) are final (i.e., not studio estimates).

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Please note, this market will resolve according to the The Numbers figures provided under Weekend Box Office Performance for the 3-day weekend (which typically includes Thursday's previews), regardless of whether domestic refers to only the USA, or to USA and Canada, etc.

If there is ambiguity as to whether the resolution source's figures are final, this market will remain open until both https://www.boxofficemojo.com/ and https://www.the-numbers.com/ have confirmed their finalized figures.

If there is no final data available by May 10, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, another credible resolution source will be chosen.

events.title: "The Devil Wears Prada 2" Opening Weekend Box Office
events.description:
This market will resolve according to how much "The Devil Wears Prada 2" Opening Weekend Box Office will gross domestically on its opening weekend. The "Daily Box Office Performance" figures found on the “Box Office” tab on this movie's The Numbers (https://www.the-numbers.com/) page will be used to resolve this market once the values for the 3-day opening weekend (May 1 - May 3) are final (i.e., not studio estimates).

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Please note, this market will resolve according to the The Numbers figures provided under Weekend Box Office Performance for the 3-day weekend (which typically includes Thursday's previews), regardless of whether domestic refers to only the USA, or to USA and Canada, etc.

If there is ambiguity as to whether the resolution source's figures are final, this market will remain open until both https://www.boxofficemojo.com/ and https://www.the-numbers.com/ have confirmed their finalized figures.

If there is no final data available by May 10, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, another credible resolution source will be chosen.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors a $70-80 million domestic opening weekend for The Devil Wears Prada 2 at 84.2% implied probability, propelled by Thursday previews grossing $10 million—trend-setting for a fashion comedy sequel—and presales doubling comparables like recent hits. Nostalgia for the 2006 original fuels buzz, with Meryl Streep's Miranda Priestly, Anne Hathaway's Andy Sachs, Emily Blunt, and Stanley Tucci reuniting under director David Frankel, alongside strong international debuts exceeding $40 million across 45 markets. Early tracking from Variety and Deadline aligned precisely at $75-80 million, though mixed reviews noting an "underwhelming" return temper upside potential beyond $90 million (under 1%). Full weekend tallies Sunday could shift dynamics based on word-of-mouth and audience scores.

markets.question: Will the Republican Party win the VA-01 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the VA-01 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

Longtime Republican incumbent Rob Wittman faces a crowded Democratic primary field including Rep. Eugene Vindman, former Henrico prosecutor Shannon Taylor, and others like Elizabeth Beggs and Jessica Knapp, with strong early fundraising signals. No recent polls are available, but ratings firms like Cook Political now rate it competitive, reflecting the map's impact on electoral math ahead of the August 4 primaries and November general election. Late scandals or turnout shifts could narrow the gap.

markets.question: Will Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) hit (HIGH) $6.50 in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during May 2026, any 1-minute candle for Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) has a final "High" price equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) "High" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily high price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

events.title: Which DCMs self-certify sports event contracts by June 30?
events.description:

eventMetadata.context_description: CFTC's March 12, 2026, advisory to designated contract markets (DCMs) clarified listing standards for sports event contracts, urging pre-self-certification talks with leagues, official data feeds for settlement, and robust manipulation analyses—prompting CME's recent filing and trader interest in others like Railbird and LedgerX. A Third Circuit ruling in April affirmed CFTC's exclusive jurisdiction, preempting state gambling laws and easing barriers. With ANPRM comments closed April 30, upcoming rulemaking could shape standards, while the June 30 self-certification deadline looms as a key catalyst for prediction market expansion on CFTC-regulated platforms. Traders weigh heightened scrutiny against growing demand for binary sports outcomes.

markets.question: Will Elon Musk post 140-159 tweets in May 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X during the month of May 2026.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1786073478711353576 will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

Community reposts which are not counted by the tracker not count toward the total.

The resolution source for this market is the 'Post Counter' figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

Late April's 158 posts from April 24-May 1 (averaging 25 daily) and early May's 21 through May 1 set a moderate baseline of 20-26 per day, but March's confirmed 1320-1359 total—43 daily average—along with peak days exceeding 50 anchor expectations for potential surges. Key swing factors include political controversies, xAI/Neuralink announcements, and Starlink expansions, which historically spike viral engagement; daily trackers through May 31 will sharpen the frontrunner as momentum builds or fades.

markets.question: Will Encore Medical’s market cap be between $50M and $55M at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on Encore Medical’s market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

As of market creation, the IPO is scheduled to price on April 22 (ET). If no such IPO occurs by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO before June 2026".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency.

It is calculated as the total number of outstanding shares, multiplied by the official closing share price of the publicly traded class on the first trading day.

If necessary, to accurately capture the company’s total market capitalization, rather than a stock-class-specific market capitalization, the calculation will include all outstanding share classes and apply any stated conversion ratios to the publicly traded class. Where no conversion right exists, such shares will be counted at their stated outstanding amount without discount, unless official filings explicitly specify differently.

The number of outstanding shares will be determined from official company filings or disclosures (e.g., SEC filings). The closing share price on the first trading day will be determined from the primary exchange’s official listing page.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official company filings and the primary exchange’s official listing page. The market capitalization will be determined through appropriate calculation using the total outstanding shares and the closing price from the first day of trading.

In the event of an interruption in the normal trading session on the specified company’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that day as the first day of trading for the purposes of this market.

Key catalysts include pricing announcement and trial progress.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".

events.title: Ecuador vs. Curaçao
events.description: This event is for the upcoming FIFA World Cup game, scheduled for Saturday, June 20, 2026 between Ecuador and Curaçao.

eventMetadata.context_description: Ecuador's strong CONMEBOL qualifying campaign, featuring key contributions from Premier League stars like Moisés Caicedo and veteran forward Enner Valencia, positions them as clear trader favorites at 77% implied probability against World Cup debutants Curaçao in this Group E clash at neutral Arrowhead Stadium. Curaçao's historic qualification via dramatic CONCACAF playoffs earned them a spot but highlights their underdog status, with limited high-level experience reflected in the 11% win pricing and 20.5% draw consensus. Recent training camps show clean injury reports for both sides, Ecuador sharpening rapid counters and set-piece execution while Curaçao emphasizes compact defending, though the step-up in class favors La Tri's tactical edge and depth.

markets.question: Will Meta have the second best AI model at the end of May 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model that has the second-highest arena rank based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on May 31, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control off will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies second place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

markets.question: Iran agrees to end enrichment of uranium by May 31?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Iran publicly agrees to end all enrichment of uranium by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

An official pledge by Iran to end all enrichment of Uranium will qualify for a “Yes” resolution whether as a unilateral announcement or part of an agreement with the U.S. or Israel.

Any agreement or pledge made before the resolution date of this market will qualify, regardless of if/when the agreement goes into effect.

An agreement by Iran to end all enrichment of uranium for any amount of time will count.

An agreement by Iran to end all enrichment of uranium as a precondition of a more comprehensive peace process or deal will qualify, even if the agreement is not finalized or part of a formalized peace deal. 

Agreements to merely limit or cap the level or quality of enrichment—such as reducing enrichment to below weapons-grade thresholds—will not qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus prices an 87.5% chance Iran will not publicly agree to end all uranium enrichment by May 31, reflecting stalled US-Iran indirect talks mediated by Pakistan and Oman amid a fragile ceasefire. On April 30, Iran submitted a counterproposal postponing nuclear discussions and linking Strait of Hormuz reopening to US guarantees against attacks, prompting President Trump to express dissatisfaction on May 1 over Tehran's inflexibility. The US demands a 20-year enrichment moratorium and handover of stockpiles, clashing with Iran's insistence on its right to enrich uranium after a mere five-year pause. IAEA reports highlight ongoing non-compliance and unverifiable stockpiles at struck facilities like Natanz and Fordow, underscoring deep impasses with just weeks remaining.

eventMetadata.context_description: Aston Villa host Tottenham Hotspur at Villa Park on May 3 in a rescheduled Premier League fixture, shifted due to Villa's Europa League semifinal advancement after a 7-1 aggregate win over Bologna. Sitting fourth with 54 points, Villa chase Champions League qualification amid strong recent form, bolstered by a lighter injury list despite concerns for Jadon Sancho (shoulder) and Emiliano Martinez (calf), with Boubacar Kamara out long-term. Tottenham, mired in relegation peril after a Sunderland defeat, face a defensive crisis without Cristian Romero (knee, season-ending), Guglielmo Vicario (groin), Mohammed Kudus (hamstring), and others like James Maddison (doubtful); Rodrigo Bentancur may return. Villa hold a recent head-to-head edge (3 wins in last 5), with home form and Spurs' injury woes shaping trader consensus on a competitive but Villa-favored matchup.

markets.question: Will gas hit (Low) $4.20 by May 31?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if on any day between market creation and May 31, 2026, the average US regular gas price is equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

Only the first two decimal digits of the reported price will be considered (e.g., if the price is reported as $3.257, this market will use $3.25 as the price).

The resolution source for this market will be information from the American Automobile Association (AAA), presently found here: https://gasprices.aaa.com/. Specifically, the cell under "Regular" and for the row "Current Avg".

eventMetadata.context_description: Polymarket traders are pricing in elevated risks for U.S. regular gasoline prices through May 31, driven by a prolonged Strait of Hormuz disruption amid U.S.-Israeli-Iran tensions, which has curtailed 20% of global oil flows and spiked West Texas Intermediate crude above $102 per barrel. National average retail prices hit $4.392 per gallon per AAA data as of May 1—up nearly 30 cents week-over-week from $4.059—exceeding EIA's April Short-Term Energy Outlook peak forecast of $4.30 amid heightened supply premiums. Seasonal demand surges around Memorial Day weekend loom as a key catalyst, with next EIA weekly data due May 5 potentially signaling further refinery margin pressures or inventory draws.

markets.question: Counter-Strike: BIG Academy vs AaB Esport (BO3) - European Pro League Regular Playoffs
markets.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Upper bracket final match between BIG Academy and AaB Esport in the European Pro League Regular Playoffs, initially scheduled for May 2 at 6:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "BIG Academy" if BIG Academy win the match against AaB Esport.

This market will resolve to "AaB Esport" if AaB Esport win the match against BIG Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

markets.question: Will Republicanos (REPUBLICANOS) win the most seats in the next Brazilian Senate election?
markets.description:
The next federal Senate election is scheduled to take place in Brazil on October 4, 2026, in which two-thirds of the Senate’s 81 seats will be contested.

This market will resolve according to the political party that wins the greatest number of seats in the next Brazilian Senate election. 

Only seats contested in the next Brazilian Senate election will be considered.

If the result of this election isn't known definitively by June 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Brazilian government, specifically the Superior Electoral Court (Tribunal Superior Eleitoral, TSE) (e.g., www.tse.jus.br/eleicoes/resultados-eleicoes).

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket heavily favors the Partido Liberal (PL) to win the most seats in Brazil's 2026 Senate election, reflecting recent state-level polls from Quaest, Datafolha, and others showing PL pré-candidatos leading in pivotal states like Santa Catarina, Rio de Janeiro, Distrito Federal, Rondônia, and Mato Grosso do Sul. Flávio Bolsonaro's direct involvement has enabled "chapa pura" strategies, positioning PL for 24-30 seats per projections, building on its current largest Senate bancada of 15. Opposition momentum surged after the April 29 Senate rejection of President Lula's STF nominee, underscoring hostility toward his allies. UNIÃO Brasil and REPUBLICANOS trail as center-right contenders with competitive slates in Ceará and elsewhere, amid balanced races elsewhere. Party conventions begin in June, with the October 4 vote determining 54 seats.

events.title: AFC Wimbledon vs. Huddersfield Town AFC
events.description: This event is for the upcoming League One game, scheduled for Saturday, May 2, 2026 between AFC Wimbledon and Huddersfield Town AFC.

eventMetadata.context_description: Huddersfield Town enter as slight trader favorites at 38.5% implied probability for this League One finale at Cherry Red Records Stadium, but AFC Wimbledon's home advantage and recent 1-0 upset win over Wigan—snapping a six-game skid—have tightened the contest, with the Dons at 34% and draw viable at 24.5%. markets.question: Will China GDP growth in Q2 2026 be between 4.0% and 4.3%?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to China's Y/Y Growth Rate (%) of Gross Domestic Product (GDP) in the "Preliminary Accounting Results of GDP" release for Q2 of 2026, scheduled for July 16, 2026.

The GDP release will be made available here: https://www.stats.gov.cn/english/PressRelease/

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

If no data for the specified quarter is released by the date the next quarter's data is scheduled to be released, this market will resolve based on data from the last available quarter.

Note: data from the initial release of the referenced GDP report is what will be used to resolve this market. Data may be revised during the following quarter or as a part of the next estimate's publication, however any revisions to GDP report data made after the initial release will not be considered for this market's resolution.

For the full release schedule, see: https://www.stats.gov.cn/english/PressRelease/ReleaseCalendar/202512/t20251226_1962154.html

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Jakarta be 33°C on May 2?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Halim Perdanakusuma Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 2 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Halim Perdanakusuma Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/id/jakarta/WIHH.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket closely splits between 33°C (42%) and 35°C (37%) for Jakarta's highest temperature today, reflecting BMKG's latest forecast of light rain and cloudy skies across all regions, with official daytime highs capped at 29–30°C and humidity 71–96% suppressing solar heating. However, international model ensembles like those implied in AccuWeather projections (up to 33°C averages) and recent April peaks of 34.7°C on the 27th fuel bets on urban heat island amplification in stations like Halim Perdanakusuma. Key differentiators include cloud cover extent, sea breeze timing, and insolation variability during dry season onset; 34°C (17%) aligns with climatological May norms around 32°C. Real-time BMKG observations will resolve amid inherent forecast uncertainty.

eventMetadata.context_description: Florida Governor Ron DeSantis, term-limited out of office in January 2027, faces slim odds of joining the Trump administration by June 30 amid unconfirmed rumors rather than official actions. Recent Axios reporting on April 21 cited sources claiming DeSantis is seeking high-profile roles like Attorney General, Secretary of Defense, or even a Supreme Court seat, prompting Trump to tell reporters on May 1 that he "likes him a lot" and would consider a cabinet spot. However, no nomination, resignation announcement, or formal discussions have materialized in the past week, with DeSantis remaining focused on state duties. Traders' strong 86% No consensus reflects the tight two-month window, historical patterns of early-term cabinet fillings, and absence of momentum for a mid-governorship exit.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket implies a 39.5% probability for Houston's highest temperature on May 3 falling in the 78-79°F range, closely followed by 80-81°F at 29%, driven by the National Weather Service's latest post-cold front forecast for the city. A cold front swept through on May 2, delivering showers, north-northeasterly winds gusting to 40 mph, and cooler Canadian air masses that dropped current observations to the upper 50s to low 60s°F at Houston's Hobby and Intercontinental airports. Clearing skies and lighter northerly flow on Saturday are expected to enable diurnal heating under ample sunshine, though below the 84°F climatological normal for early May at IAH. Model ensembles like GFS and ECMWF show limited spread around upper 70s, with final short-range updates from NOAA potentially refining land surface temperatures before resolution at official observing sites.

markets.question: LoL: MVK Esports vs Ground Zero Gaming (BO3) - LCP Regular Season
markets.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between MVK Esports and Ground Zero Gaming in the LCP Regular Season, initially scheduled for May 2 at 5:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "MVK Esports" if MVK Esports win the match against Ground Zero Gaming.

This market will resolve to "Ground Zero Gaming" if Ground Zero Gaming win the match against MVK Esports.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

markets.question: Will US crude oil reserves fall to 325M by June 5?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the U.S. Energy Information Administration publishes a weekly figure for U.S. Ending Stocks of Crude Oil in the Strategic Petroleum Reserve less than or equal to the specified value for any week ending on or before June 5, 2026. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve as soon as the listed value is reached, or once data has been released for the final week ending on or before June 5, 2026, and the listed value has not been reached.

If data has not been released for the final week ending on or before June 5 2026, by June 12, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve based on the data available at that time.

The primary resolution source for this market will be the U.S. Energy Information Administration, specifically the weekly data published for the U.S. Ending Stocks of Crude Oil in the Strategic Petroleum Reserve at https://www.eia.gov/dnav/pet/hist/LeafHandler.ashx?n=PET&s=WCSSTUS1&f=W.

Note: this market’s resolution source publishes weekly values of U.S. Ending Stocks of Crude Oil in the Strategic Petroleum Reserve in thousands of barrels. Thus, this will be the level of specificity used to resolve this market.

markets.question: Will Renan Santos finish in second place in the first round of the 2026 Brazilian presidential election?
markets.description:
A presidential election is scheduled to take place in Brazil on October 4, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the listed candidate who receives the second-most valid votes in the first round of this election.

The named candidates will be primarily ranked by the number of valid votes received in the specified election. If two or more candidates are tied on valid votes, ties will be broken by alphabetical order of the candidates' last names. This market will resolve to the candidate that occupies the second-highest finishing position after applying this ranking.

If the result of this election isn't known definitively by June 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Brazilian government, specifically the Superior Electoral Court (Tribunal Superior Eleitoral, TSE) (e.g., https://dadosabertos.tse.jus.br/).

markets.question: Will xAI have the best AI model at the end of June 2026?

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

China Meteorological Administration forecasts and international models like those from AccuWeather align with this, projecting highs of 22–24°C amid cooler-than-average May conditions (climatological norms: 25–28°C), suppressed by overcast skies limiting solar insolation.
